VAL-CROSS-006.evidence: All three critical fixes from DESIGN.md section 11 are verified intact: (11.1) Emergency stack sizing: exception.S __exc_stacks uses .space 4096 * 8, matching per_core::MAX_CORES = 8. (11.2) Emergency stacks alignment: exception.S uses .section .bss.exc_stacks, link.ld has explicit .bss.exc_stacks (NOLOAD) with ALIGN(4096). (11.3) Virtio push_chain: intermediate descriptors correctly set both desc.flags |= DESC_F_NEXT and desc.next = next_free (line 338-339 of virtio/lib.rs).

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. All 33 kernel .rs files have AUDIT comments. Build succeeds and 1006 tests pass with 0 failures. All 3 critical one-line fixes (emergency stack sizing, stacks alignment, virtio push_chain next descriptor) are verified intact.
